mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.company_name as companyName FROM project p LEFT JOIN company c ON p.biz_no = c.biz_no
SELECT id AS "id", name AS "name" FROM users WHERE biz_no = #{bizNo} AND name LIKE '%' || #{term} || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enabled_modules (ena_id, prj_id, ena_name_cd) VALUES (en_mod_seq.nextval, #{prjId}, #{enaNameCd})
